column2: 2 of 4 uploaded (Xijin Bridge anchor, Longchuan Park outdoors); Guli coords resolve to downtown Yongkang, Zhejiang where Places coverage is minimal: all shopping-dining and culture candidates (China Technology Hardware City, Lizhou Square, Ziwei Park, Business and Trade City) return only night shots, interiors, or wrong-city (Taipei/Jinhua) matches; text-only would invent the appearance of these specific buildings

0 of 4 generatable: Places coverage for Jinchengjiang (Hechi) limited to Jinchengjiang Park (all photos hazy with prominent posed people), Baima Pedestrian Street (night/crowd/food photos only), and railway station platform signs; with-ref generations either retained the prominent person (1/6) or ignored the low-quality ref and invented pagoda landmarks (5/6); text-only for Baima Pedestrian Street invented an ancient paifang gateway street (wrong place)

3 of 4 uploaded (Dongpo Red Cliffs anchor, Yi ai Lake Park outdoors, Anguo Temple culture); no shopping-dining generatable: Wanda/People Square/Huangshang queries resolve to Huangshi or Qichun (wrong city), Dongpo Bund resolves to Shanghai Bund or returns only a night shopfront with readable signage, pedestrian-street queries return no results

1 of 4 uploaded (People Square anchor); Places coverage of Jiaohe city centre is near-empty: parks (Binhe, Changan), pedestrian/commercial streets, station square, stadium, churches and government-square queries all return zero photo results; Lafa Mountain forest park is 15km away (not walkable); text-only fallback would invent the appearance of unverifiable POIs
only 3 confident real POIs (Dongjie, Huashan Park, Yinzi Temple); Google Places has no usable data for a distinct shopping-dining POI in Nanchuan urban core

mis-geocoded source data: coordinates (31.22967,121.476161) are People's Square in central Shanghai, not Panshan (Liaoning Panshan county is at ~41.2N); generating imagery would attach wrong-city photos to this parent_id
insufficient Places data: no verifiable walkable POIs in city centre (results snap to sites 100-300km away; only bus terminal with overcast/interior photos)
insufficient Places data: no verifiable walkable POIs in city centre (12 queries return empty or snap to Hong Kong/Singapore/Zhengzhou; only Shifo Temple with hazy washed-out photo)

mis-geocoded source data: manifest coords (35.7118158,139.7782897) resolve to TOYOTA Rent-a-car Ueno in Tokyo, not Toyotashi Station in Toyota Aichi (~35.087N,137.156E); no walkable POIs verifiable at the wrong coordinates
